title: Executive Salary Negotiation
description: Base, equity, vesting, control — negotiating senior roles without burning relationships.
summary_pt_br: Negociação executiva: âncora alta, equity separado da base, vesting (4 anos, cliff 1), controle (decisões, board).

scenes.subtitle_en: Base, equity, vesting, control — negotiating senior roles without burning relationships.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Negociação executiva: âncora alta, equity separado da base, vesting (4 anos, cliff 1), controle (decisões, board).

scenes.text_en: Base, equity, vesting, control — negotiating senior roles without burning relationships. Focus: executive salary negotiation. Market for this role ranges from X to Y — I'd anchor at the top.
scenes.text_pt: Negociação executiva: âncora alta, equity separado da base, vesting (4 anos, cliff 1), controle (decisões, board). Foco: executive salary negotiation. Mercado pra esse cargo é X a Y — eu ancoro no topo.

scenes.title: Executive Salary Negotiation
scenes.body_en: Exec negotiation: ANCHOR high, explain the range. Discuss EQUITY separately from base. Name VESTING (4y standard, 1y cliff). Define CONTROL (decisions, hiring, board seat).
scenes.body_pt: Negociação executiva: âncora alta, equity separado da base, vesting (4 anos, cliff 1), controle (decisões, board).

examples.en: Market for this role ranges from X to Y — I'd anchor at the top.
examples.pt: Mercado pra esse cargo é X a Y — eu ancoro no topo.

examples.en: Four-year vest, one-year cliff, accelerated on acquisition.
examples.pt: Vest 4 anos, cliff 1, aceleração em aquisição.

examples.en: Let's separate base, equity, and signing into three conversations.
examples.pt: Vamos separar base, equity e signing em três conversas.

exercise.question: Complete: "___ for this role ranges from X to Y — I'd anchor at the top."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Market for this role ranges from X to Y — I'd anchor at the top."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Mercado pra esse cargo é X a Y — eu ancoro no topo.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Four-year vest, one-year cliff, accelerated on acquisition.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Four-year vest, one-year cliff, accelerated on acquisition."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Vest 4 anos, cliff 1, aceleração em aquisição.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Executive Salary Negotiation — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre executive salary negotiation. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca — new CEO offer. Your opening move.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Anchor at the top of market range.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Separate equity from base — different talk.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Single-trigger acceleration on change of control.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Board seat, hiring authority, final product decisions.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Executive deals are about power, not just pay.

scenes.title: The offer call
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four negotiation levers beyond base salary. Use at least three exec terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On Sunday evening, Joca took the offer call from the chairman who had recruited him across three continents.

paragraphs.speaker: Chairman
paragraphs.en: We can go to the top of the published market range on base salary, but equity will be a separate conversation entirely.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Perfect — I agree we separate base, equity, and signing into three conversations. Let's start with vesting.

paragraphs.speaker: Chairman
paragraphs.en: Four-year vest with a one-year cliff — industry standard. Single-trigger acceleration on change of control.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Beyond money, I need a board seat, full hiring authority, and final product decisions not overridden at the committee level.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Executive negotiations, Joca had come to understand, are about power as much as pay — and naming each lever by name.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Executive Salary Negotiation". Base, equity, vesting, control — negotiating senior roles without burning relationships. Market for this role ranges from X to Y — I'd anchor at the top. Four-year vest, one-year cliff, accelerated on acquisition. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Executive Salary Negotiation". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Executive Salary Negotiation".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Executive Salary Negotiation".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
